title: It's 10 years since Latvia joined the OECD
summary_full: Today, July 1st, marks 10 years since Latvia joined the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), the Latvian Foreign Ministry said in a reminder for the vast majority of the population who probably don't have the date marked on their calendars.
